Package com.dtwthalion.ttio.importers

package com.dtwthalion.ttio.importers
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.dtwthalion.ttio
     
  • Class
    Description
    BrukerTDFReader
    Bruker timsTOF .d importer — v0.8 M53.
    BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException
    Raised when the binary extraction path is requested but the Python delegate cannot be located or execution fails.
    BrukerTDFReader.Metadata
    SQLite-level metadata snapshot — no binary extraction required.
    CVTermMapper
    Maps PSI-MS and nmrCV controlled-vocabulary accessions to TTIO model values (precision, compression, array role, spectrum metadata).
    ImzMLReader
    imzML + .ibd importer — v0.9 M59.
    ImzMLReader.ImzMLBinaryException
    Raised when the .ibd binary disagrees with the .imzML metadata (UUID mismatch or offset overflow).
    ImzMLReader.ImzMLImport
    Result of parsing an imzML + .ibd pair.
    ImzMLReader.ImzMLParseException
    Raised when the imzML XML is structurally invalid for our needs.
    ImzMLReader.PixelSpectrum
    One pixel's spatial coordinates plus its m/z + intensity arrays.
    JcampDxDecode
    JCAMP-DX 5.01 compressed-XYDATA decoder (SQZ / DIF / DUP / PAC).
    JcampDxDecode.DecodedXY
    Decoded XYDATA: two equal-length primitive arrays.
    JcampDxReader
    JCAMP-DX 5.01 reader for 1-D vibrational and UV-Vis spectra.
    MzMLParseException
    Thrown when an mzML document cannot be parsed: malformed XML, missing required elements, or unsupported schema features.
    MzMLReader
    SAX-based mzML 1.1 parser.
    MzTabReader
    mzTab importer — v0.9 M60.
    MzTabReader.MzTabImport
    In-memory representation of a parsed mzTab document.
    MzTabReader.MzTabParseException
    Raised when the mzTab document is structurally invalid.
    NmrMLParseException
    Thrown when an nmrML document cannot be parsed.
    NmrMLReader
    SAX-based parser for nmrML files.
    NmrMLReader.NmrMLResult
    Parse result bundling the AcquisitionRun and optional FID.
    ThermoRawException
    Thrown when the ThermoRawFileParser delegation fails: binary not found, unsupported .raw file, or conversion produces unparseable mzML.
    ThermoRawReader
    Thermo .raw importer — M38.
    TtioReaderException
    Base type for importer failures (mzML, nmrML, Thermo RAW).
    WatersMassLynxReader
    Waters MassLynx .raw directory importer — v0.9 M63.
    WatersMassLynxReader.WatersMassLynxException
    Raised when the converter exits non-zero or produces no mzML.
